跳过导航链接
  • 概览
  • 程序包
  • 类
  • 使用
  • 树
  • 索引
  • 帮助

All Classes and Interfaces

类
说明
AdminDashboardServlet
Displays the Admin dashboard: workload statistics and summary metrics.
AdminService
Provides administrative operations: dashboard statistics, user workload analysis, and bulk user management.
AdminServlet
Central Admin controller handling all admin-panel routes.
Application
Represents a TA's application for a specific job posting.
ApplicationService
Provides business-logic operations for job applications.
ApplicationStatus
Possible states of a TA's job application.
ApplicationStatusServlet
Displays the current TA's submitted applications, enriched with job details (title, module code, organiser) via ApplicationWithJob.
ApplicationWithJob
A read-only view object that combines an Application with denormalized job details (title, module code, and organiser).
ApplyServlet
Handles TA job application submissions.
CandidateSummaryServlet
Displays a structured candidate summary view for a TA's profile.
CvDeleteServlet
Handles deletion of the current TA's uploaded CV.
CvFileService
Handles physical file operations for TA CV PDFs.
CvFileService.SavedCvFile
Holds metadata about a successfully saved CV file.
CvUploadServlet
Handles PDF CV file upload for the current TA.
DashboardService
Provides data for the TA dashboard: pending application counts, matched job counts, and personalised best-match messages.
FileDownloadServlet
Streams a TA's uploaded CV PDF to the browser.
FileStorageUtil
Centralised file-based persistence layer for the TA Recruitment System.
HomeServlet
Home page controller.
Job
Represents a job posting in the TA Recruitment System.
JobListServlet
Lists all open jobs for the current TA, sorted by match score descending.
JobService
Provides business-logic operations for job postings.
JobStatus
Possible states of a job posting.
LoginServlet
Handles user login.
LogoutServlet
Destroys the current session and redirects to the home page.
LogService
Manages the system audit log stored in data/system_logs.csv.
MOApplicationServlet
Displays and manages applications for the logged-in MO's jobs.
MODashboardServlet
Displays the MO dashboard, showing only jobs created by the logged-in MO (matched by display name).
MOJobServlet
Handles MO job creation.
RegisterServlet
Handles TA registration.
SystemLog
Represents an entry in the system audit log.
TaDashboardServlet
Displays the TA dashboard for the current logged-in TA.
TaProfileServlet
Manages the TA profile page.
User
Represents a user account in the TA Recruitment System.
UserRole
User roles in the TA Recruitment System.
UserService
Provides business-logic operations for user accounts and TA profiles.
